# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { ReadableStream } from "web-streams";
import { EdgeResponse, RequestEvent } from "@vercel/edge-model";

export async function handler(event: RequestEvent) {
  const { request, response } = event;

  // Get the POST body and headers from the user
  const body = await request.body();
  const headers = request.headers;

  // Create a new ReadableStream to stream the data back to the client
  const readableStream = new ReadableStream({
    async start(controller) {
      try {
        // Pipe the user data directly to the response
        await body.pipeTo(response);
      } catch (error) {
        console.error(error);
      } finally {
        controller.close();
      }
    },
  });

  // Set the correct headers on the response
  response.headers.set("Content-Type", "text/plain");

  return new EdgeResponse({
    status: 200,
    body: readableStream,
  });
}
